name: Ashutosh Kaushik
profileSummary: Ashutosh Kaushik is an Indian actor and reality TV participant. Kaushik was the winner of MTV Hero Honda Roadies 5.0 in 2007 and the 2nd season of Bigg Boss in 2008. Later he was also seen in MTV Roadies 8. He has had a role in the movies Zila Ghaziabad and Kismat Love Paisa Dilli.
